title: Soft Tool Break Sounds
description: Replaces the loud jarring noise of tools breaking with a softer "thud" sound.
body:
─── °•. ✿ .•° ───

Soft Tool Break Sounds is a resource pack to alter the sounds of your tools breaking!

This pack is exactly what it says on the tin; I hate how jarring the tool break sound effect can be, so I replaced it with a much more pleasant "thud" sound. It fits the vibe of the original, without all the unnecassary ear piercing qualities! I hope you enjoy :)

Features packs for Minecraft Versions 1.13 to 1.21.10 

─── °•. ✿ .•° ───
